insight: ChatControl's Discord integration requires the DiscordSRV plugin. Users must disable DiscordSRV's built-in chat relay by setting `DiscordChatChannelMinecraftToDiscord: false` in DiscordSRV's `config.yml`, otherwise messages get duplicated. ChatControl checks this on startup and logs a warning if it's still enabled (see ChatControl.java line ~247).

The mail join notification delay in PlayerCache.onJoin() runs AFTER an async database lookup, while MOTD delay (Settings.Motd.DELAY) runs BEFORE its async task. This means their timing models differ: mail total delay = async DB time + Join_Notification_Delay ticks, vs MOTD total delay = Motd.Delay ticks + async formatting. When users report join notifications appearing in wrong order, check these competing async timing chains rather than just comparing tick values.
